entry.title: Sugarfree Mysore Pak
entry.summary:
Vendor: Dadu’s (Indian Mithai)
Type: Sugarfree Mithai
Price: 400.00

Dadus Sugar-Free Mysore Pak captures the rich, buttery essence of traditional Mysore Pak with zero to negligible sucrose content, confirmed by rigorous lab testing. 

Sweetened with Stevia, a natural, plant-based sweetener with a low glycemic index, our Mysore Pak is ideal for managing blood sugar levels. 

With fewer calories, it is a healthier option for diet-conscious individuals. Made with 100% natural ingredients, Dadu’s Mysore Pak contains no artificial additives, ensuring a delicious and healthy treat.

What other Sugar Free Sweets does Dadus offer?

Dadus offers a variety of sugar-free sweets, including Kaju Katli, Mysore Pak, Golden Coin, Anjeer Dry Fruit Delight, Badamees, and Khajoor Coin, all crafted for a guilt-free indulgence. 

Can people with Diabetes/Sugar eat Dadus sugar free sweets?

Absolutely. People with diabetes can enjoy Dadu’s sweets as they are sweetened with Stevia, suitable for blood sugar management. However, it is advisable for those with Type-1 Diabetes to consult their GP before consumption.

Choose Dadu’s sugar-free sweets for a healthier treat with fewer calories and natural ingredients. Shopping for premium sweets online is easy with Dadu's. 

Visit Dadu’s near you for a free tasting and gourmet experience.
In Hyderabad, explore our sweets on Swiggy & Zomato for instant delivery. 

All Dadu's sweets are fresh, vegetarian, and free from preservatives or artificial colours.

entry.title: Sugarfree Kaju Katli | Stevia Based
entry.summary:
Vendor: Dadu’s (Indian Mithai)
Type: Sugarfree Mithai
Price: 680.00

Dadus Sugar-Free Kaju Katli offers the rich, authentic taste of traditional Kaju Katli with zero to negligible sucrose content, vetted by rigorous lab testing. 

Sweetened with Stevia, a natural, plant-based sweetener with a low glycemic index, these sweets are perfect for managing blood sugar levels.

With fewer calories, our sugar-free Kaju Katli is definitely a healthier choice for diabetics and diet-conscious individuals.

Made with 100% natural ingredients, Dadus sweets ensure no artificial additives, providing a delicious and healthy treat.

What other Sugar Free Sweets does Dadus offer?

Dadus offers a variety of sugar-free sweets, including Kaju Katli, Mysore Pak, Golden Coin, Anjeer Dry Fruit Delight, Badamees, and Khajoor Coin, all crafted for a guilt-free indulgence. 

Can people with Diabetes/Sugar eat Dadus sugar free sweets?

Absolutely. People with diabetes can enjoy Dadu’s sweets as they are sweetened with Stevia, suitable for blood sugar management. However, it is advisable for those with Type-1 Diabetes to consult their GP before consumption.

Choose Dadu’s sugar-free sweets for a healthier treat with fewer calories and natural ingredients. Shopping for premium sweets online is easy with Dadu's.

entry.title: Sugarfree Chana Burfi
entry.summary:

entry.title: Sugarfree Anjeer Delight
entry.summary:
Vendor: Dadu’s (Indian Mithai)
Type: Sugarfree Mithai
Price: 700.00

Savour the natural sweetness of figs with Dadu's Sugar-Free Anjeer Dry Fruit Delight.

These sweets are crafted with zero to negligible sucrose, verified by rigorous lab tests, and sweetened with Stevia, a plant-based sweetener with a low glycemic index, making them perfect for managing blood sugar levels.

With fewer calories, they are a healthier choice for diet-conscious individuals. Made from 100% natural ingredients without artificial additives, these treats ensure a delightful and nutritious experience.

What other Sugar Free Sweets does Dadus offer?

Dadus offers a variety of sugar-free sweets, including Kaju Katli, Mysore Pak, Golden Coin, Anjeer Dry Fruit Delight, Badamees, and Khajoor Coin, all crafted for a guilt-free indulgence. 

Can people with Diabetes/Sugar eat Dadus sugar free sweets?

Absolutely. People with diabetes can enjoy Dadu’s sweets as they are sweetened with Stevia, suitable for blood sugar management. However, it is advisable for those with Type-1 Diabetes to consult their GP before consumption.

Choose Dadu’s sugar-free sweets for a healthier treat with fewer calories and natural ingredients. Shopping for premium sweets online is easy with Dadu's. 

Visit Dadu’s near you for a free tasting and gourmet experience.
In Hyderabad, explore our sweets on Swiggy & Zomato for instant delivery. 

All Dadu's sweets are fresh, vegetarian, and free from preservatives or artificial colours.
